name: PAY_TMPLT_VERSION_F_VL
query: SELECT PTV.TMPLT_VERSION_ID TMPLT_VERSION_ID, PTV.TEMPLATE_ID TEMPLATE_ID, PTV.VERSION VERSION, PTVTL.VERSION_INFO VERSION_INFO, PTV.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PTV.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, PTV.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, PTV.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, PTV.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PTV.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PTV.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID FROM PAY_TMPLT_VERSION_F PTV, PAY_TMPLT_VERSION_F_TL PTVTL WHERE PTV.TMPLT_VERSION_ID = PTVTL.TMPLT_VERSION_ID AND PTVTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
